regulatory_bodies: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways (MoRTH)

national_rules.helmet_rule: Helmet mandatory for rider and pillion on two-wheelers
national_rules.seatbelt_rule: Seat belt mandatory for all passengers
national_rules.mobile_phone_usage: Hand-held phone usage prohibited while driving
